text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh... I knew it wouldn't be easy to find them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My curiosity gets the better of me when I hear
Zenno Rob Roy let out a small sigh, and I ask her
what's the matter.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm trying to find the owner of this
bookmark.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I found it in a library book. I'm thinking it
belongs to the person who borrowed it before
me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's such a lovely pressed flower bookmark. I'm
sure this person is a big book lover.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'd hate for them to be without their bookmark,
which is why I want to make sure I get it back to
them.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Plus, they're a fan of the cult classic Run, Umas, so they must be a kindred spirit. Hehe.
choice_data_list:
Why not ask the student library assistant for
help?
What kind of story is it?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... Um, I'm the student library assistant,
so...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Wait... That's right! I can look at the loans system!
I'm sure I can find their name that way!
choice_data_list: Let's go check it out now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy uses her library assistant
privileges to access the loan data to find out who
the last Umamusume to borrow the book was.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to talk to everyone who's
recently checked out this book, and we can find
who this bookmark belongs to.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a lot of work to go around the campus,
but...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm excited to meet someone who's read the same
book as me!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh, it'd be so fun if we could discuss the
book and share our thoughts on it together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It's a passionate coming-of-age story that talks
about the trials and tribulations of an
Umamusume who runs mid-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
The protagonist is a gentle yet naive Umamusume
named Umas. However, she's not good at
speaking and gets misunderstood a lot. She's
always alone during practices.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
There's only one person she can call a friend, but
unlike Umas, her friend is super cheerful and
popular and has a bright future ahead of her...
choice_data_list:
(Wow, she's really going into detail about this
book!)

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But one day, tragedy befalls her best friend. She
suffers a serious injury from an unforeseen
accident and can never race again...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When her friend announces her retirement, she
entrusts Umas with a heavy promise... "You must
carry on my dream for me."

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sniff... Hic! That's one of the most famous scenes in the book, but I still can't help crying when I think about it!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Umas ends up taking the Fall Senior
Triple Crown in her best friend's stead.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
What do you think? It's one of my absolute
favorites.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
In that case, please give it a read! I'd love to
discuss it with you after you're done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy's eyes sparkle with expectation as
she looks at me.
